workLog.action: Read candidate issues file and confirmed branch feat/1758-autonomous targets issue #1758 (priority:P1).
Studied ADR-008 (lifecycle hooks), retrospective.agent.md, skillbook.agent.md, claude.yml, rjmurillo-bot.yml, and yamllint config.
Verified anthropics/claude-code-action v1.0.103 supports headless prompt: input via fetch of upstream action.yml.
Designed gate logic: skip bot authors and fork PRs; escalate depth on unmerged close, rework markers, high review-comment density. No new labels invented.
Authored .github/workflows/post-pr-retrospective.yml with two jobs (prepare + retrospective). Untrusted PR fields stay in env vars; numeric/boolean only in step outputs.
Validated: yamllint exit 0, bash -n syntax ok, prompt heredoc expands correctly, YAML parses round-trip.

nextSteps: Commit workflow + session log on feat/1758-autonomous.
Open PR with Fixes #1758 and enable auto-merge.
